mapper.select:
select * from `gas_station_price_period`
#{startTime} <= start_time and -- `start_time` <= #{endTime} and
order by start_time DESC
select * from `gas_station_price_period` where start_time < #{startTime} order by start_time DESC limit 1
select * from `gas_station_price_period` where start_time > #{startTime} order by start_time limit 1
mapper.insert: -- insert into `gas_station_price_period`(`start_time`, `end_time`, `rise`, create_by, create_time, remark) insert into `gas_station_price_period`(`start_time`, `rise`, create_by, create_time, remark) value (#{startTime,typeHandler=com.ruoyi.gas.module.price.mapper.handler.DateTimeHandler}, -- #{endTime,typeHandler=com.ruoyi.gas.module.price.mapper.handler.DateTimeHandler}, #{rise},#{createBy},sysdate(),#{remark})
mapper.update: update `gas_station_price_period` set `start_time` = #{startTime,typeHandler=com.ruoyi.gas.module.price.mapper.handler.DateTimeHandler}, -- `end_time` = #{endTime,typeHandler=com.ruoyi.gas.module.price.mapper.handler.DateTimeHandler}, `rise` = #{rise}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where `id` = #{id}
